v1 procedural sfxr output was REJECTED as low quality and removed. Rebuilt around ElevenLabs SFX v2 (lossless 48kHz + local mastering + AAA foley prompts). BLOCKED until ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (Pro tier) is provided; loop refuses to ship low-fi.

requests.text: sounds/ is live: 30 game SFX (ui/item/tool/movement/combat/feedback). Read sounds/viewer_data.json for the catalog; each clip is a 44.1kHz WAV at sounds/<category>/<id>/<id>.wav, served at /assets/sounds/<category>/<id>/<id>.wav. Map events->clips e.g. coin pickup->ui/coin_pickup, sword hit->tool/sword_hit, footsteps->movement/footstep_grass|stone|wood. Tell me which sounds you need next.
